commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9dd81578713d31ee5a88b788a0c1d87f888e038b)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a ClickClack token fallback that retries configured-unavailable non-env SecretRefs through strict secret-input resolution before returning an empty token.

PR surface: Source +25. Total +25 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows a resolvable non-env ClickClack token SecretRef reaches `resolveClickClackToken`, receives `configured_unavailable`, skips the env-only branch, and returns an empty token.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the central repair is incorrect and contributor-side proof for the exact branch is insufficient.

target.title: fix(clickclack): resolve exec/file SecretRefs at runtime instead of silently returning empty
target.author: wm0018

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
